meta.description: Framework for building interactive terminal apps — 30+ components, grid system, spatial navigation, themes, ASCII art, file-based routing, SSH hosting. Run via npx or host over SSH.
meta.name: terminaltui

npm.description: Framework for building interactive terminal websites and apps — 30+ components, grid system, spatial navigation, themes, ASCII art, file-based routing
npm.name: terminaltui

releases.body:
Hotfix for v1.8.0. `npx terminaltui try` crashed at startup with `Cannot find module '<pkg>/demos/src/index.js'` — caught by the first user trying it from a clean install. Demos' relative framework imports (`../../src/index.js`) were externalized as literal strings, then resolved relative to the compiled .mjs's location (one level deeper than the source), so the path landed inside `demos/` instead of the package root.

## Fixed

- **`runDemo()` failed when invoked from an installed copy of the package** — added an esbuild `onResolve` plugin in `compileFile` that rewrites any relative `*/src/index.{js,ts}` import to the bare specifier \`terminaltui\`. Node's normal package resolution then finds the framework regardless of where the \`.mjs\` cache file ends up. Local dev (tsx mode) is unaffected — \`compileFile\` short-circuits in that mode and never runs esbuild.

## Install

\`\`\`
npx terminaltui@1.8.1 try
\`\`\`

Verified end-to-end on a fresh install: tarball → \`npm install\` → \`npx terminaltui try\` boots into the welcome demo cleanly.
releases.name: v1.8.1 — hotfix terminaltui try

releases.body:
![terminaltui — 5-page tour rendered in a Synthwave-themed terminal: ANSI Shadow banner, navigable menu, components showcase, live theme switching, animated sparklines](https://github.com/OmarMusayev/terminaltui/raw/v1.8.0/assets/recordings/launch-hero-bg.gif)

Launch-readiness release. Adds `npx terminaltui try` as a one-command pitch, ships two new bundled demos (`welcome`, `mac-monitor`), exposes `setTheme()` as a runtime helper, and fixes three bugs that surfaced while building the launch tour.

```
npx terminaltui try
```

## Added

- **`npx terminaltui try`** — opens a 5-page guided tour of the framework (home, components showcase, themes picker, live data, get-started) in a Synthwave palette. Doubles as a smoke test for someone discovering the framework via README. Source under `demos/welcome/`.
- **`mac-monitor` demo** — bundled real-time macOS system monitor (CPU, memory, processes, network). Runs with `npx terminaltui dev demos/mac-monitor/site.config.ts`.
- **`setTheme(name)`** is now exported from the package root — call from a button's `onPress` to swap the active theme in-place. Returns `false` if the name isn't recognized; the runtime re-renders on success.
- **Code of Conduct, security policy, PR template** under `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md`, `SECURITY.md`, `.github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md`.

## Fixed

- **`menu-builder` crashed when `metadata.label` was a function** — both `resolveMenuLabel` and the sort comparator assumed string labels. Parameterized routes that derive their menu label at runtime (`label: ({ params }) => …`) threw `a.label.localeCompare is not a function` on first render. Now type-checked + coerced with `String(...)` in the comparator.
- **`:theme tokyoNight` and `:theme rosePine` failed** — `executeCommand` lowercased the entire trimmed input before dispatch, so the camelCase argument never matched the theme registry key. Now splits verb from argument and only lowercases the verb. Pinned with `test/test-commands.test.ts` (+11 assertions).
- **Number-key page jumps only worked from the home menu** — README claimed they worked from anywhere; `runtime-input.ts` had an `isHome()` guard that contradicted the docs. Guard removed.
- **`init` scaffolder hardcoded `^1.6.0`** — generated `package.json` files pinned the framework two versions behind. Now reads the framework's own version dynamically.

## Changed

- **README repositioned as "Next.js for the terminal"** — added comparison table vs Ink/Pastel/Bubble Tea, hero recording, test-count badge.
- Test count: 2,127 → 2,142 across 26 suites.

## Install

```
npm install terminaltui@1.8.0
```

Full changelog: https://github.com/OmarMusayev/terminaltui/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md
releases.name: v1.8.0 — npx terminaltui try

releases.body:
Project-wide review pass. Two production-impacting bugs, multi-session SSH correctness, and a sweep of dead code from the 1.6.0 cleanup that didn't get fully removed.

## Fixed (production bugs)

- **`:theme` command crashed on use** — `runtime-pages.ts` used `require()` inside an ESM-only package. Switched to a static import.
- **`requireEnv` and `rateLimit` middleware were silently bypassed** — `runMiddleware().catch()` fell through to `doNavigate`. Throws now surface a `Blocked: <message>` feedback line and the navigation aborts.
- **Concurrent SSH sessions clobbered each other** — `_renderCallback`, `_navigateFn`, and `apiBaseUrl` were module-level globals; the most recent `runtime.start()` won. Added `core/runtime-context.ts` with `AsyncLocalStorage`; helpers consult the active context first.
- **`createPersistentState()` leaked process listeners** — three handlers per call. Now a single shared exit-flush handler is registered once.
- **`asyncContent` render storm** — the loading branch scheduled `setTimeout(rt.render, 100)` on every render. One guarded spinner timer per runtime now.
- **`stringWidth` adopted unevenly** — `Timeline.ts`, `Divider.ts`, the inline accordion in `runtime-render.ts`, and `TextInput.ts` masking used `.length` where they needed display width. CJK and emoji rendered miscounted.
- **`ascii/image.ts` emitted raw 24-bit ANSI** — bypassed the 256-color fallback path. Added `fgColorRgb()` to `style/colors.ts`; image renderers route through it.

## Removed (breaking)

- `componentRegistry`, `Component` (interface), `ComponentRegistry` class — the registry was decorative; `runtime-block-render.ts`'s switch was authoritative.
- `ApiServer`, `setApiBaseUrl`, `FileRouter` — internal classes that should never have been part of the public surface.
- `dynamic(deps, render)` overload — `deps` was stored but never read.

## Changed

- **Test runner**: `test/run-all.ts` now globs instead of an allowlist of 10 files. Default suite went from 1,469 to 2,127 passing assertions across 25 suites. `--stress`, `--demos`, `--all` flags opt into the slower suites.
- **`terminaltui serve` single-file path removed** — clear error pointing at `terminaltui init` when running serve on a non-file-based project.
- **`compileFile` skips esbuild bundling under tsx/ts-node** — projects whose pages import the framework via relative paths no longer trip on native binaries.
- **`compileFile` cache key is sha1 of absolute path** — collision-proof.
- **`box-model` is closer to single source of truth** — `flex-engine.estimateBlockHeight` (card branch) derives chrome from `COMPONENT_DEFAULTS`; `Panel.ts` uses `computeBoxDimensions`.

## Security hardening

- `exec` / `execSync` → `spawn` / `spawnSync` with array args in `helpers/open-url.ts`, `helpers/clipboard.ts`, `core/ssh-server.ts` (host-key generation).
- `terminaltui art create <type> <name>` validates `name` against `/^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9_-]*$/i` (path-traversal guard).
- `api/server.ts` caps request bodies at 1 MB.

## Notes

- SSH `serve` keeps its allow-all default; password auth remains opt-in via `auth.passwords`.
- `ARCHITECTURE.md` rewritten to match the post-1.6.0 reality.

## Removed dead files (no behavior change)

`src/core/renderer.ts`, `src/layout/engine.ts`, `src/layout/constraints.ts`, `src/ascii/fonts-extra.ts`, `src/cli/init-templates.ts`, `src/components/registry.ts`. Plus matching test cleanup.

---

[Full changelog](https://github.com/OmarMusayev/terminaltui/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) · [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/terminaltui)
releases.name: v1.7.0 — project-wide review pass

releases.body:
The framework now consolidates around **file-based routing** as the only project format and trims redundant or unused API surface. Net: ~19,000 lines deleted, public API down from 63 to 51 exports.

If you have an existing project on `1.5.x`, see the migration notes at the bottom.

## Removed (breaking)

- **Single-file `site.config.ts` mode** — `defineSite()`, `page()`, `route()`, `runSite()`, and the `terminaltui migrate` command are gone. Projects must use `config.ts` + `pages/` (+ optional `api/`).
- **Layout helpers `split()` and `box()`** — `split()` was identical to `columns([panel, panel])`; `box()` overlapped with `panel()`. Use the explicit forms.
- **Animation transitions** — `transition.ts`, `typing.ts`, `stagger.ts`, `fade.ts`, `effects.ts` (matrix rain / glitch / sparkle) deleted. The `transitions` field on `AnimationConfig` is gone. `boot`, `exitMessage`, and `spinner` survive.
- **ASCII community-pack public API** — `registerArtPack`, `useArtPack`, `listArt`, `getArtInfo`, `createArtPack`, `registerFont/Scene/Icon/Pattern`, art-registry types. Internal art registry stays as plumbing for built-in assets.
- **`artCompose`** (overlay/mirror/rotate/colorize/shadow on string[] art) — niche, not used by demos.
- **`brailleSparkline`, `dotMatrix`, `braillePattern`** — exotic. Use `asciiArt.sparkline()`.
- **Tetris demo** — broken since 1.0.5; removed.
- **`PanelFocusManager`** dead code (deprecated since 1.0.5).
- **`runPreview` CLI stub** (never implemented).
- **`src/routing/` folder** — `navigate()` moved into `src/router/`; route and middleware types moved to `router/types.ts` and `middleware/types.ts`.

## Changed

- **Demo bundling pipeline dropped.** Demo sources ship in the npm package under `demos/<name>/` and compile on the fly via `npx terminaltui demo <name>`. No more `dist/demos/*.js` artifacts.
- **`terminaltui build` rewritten for file-based only.** The generated bundle entry point uses `TUIRuntime` directly instead of the deleted `defineSite`/`page`/`runSite` helpers.
- **`terminaltui dev`** now requires `config.ts + pages/`. Single-file configs error clearly.
- **`server-dashboard` registered** in `DEMO_NAMES` (was advertised in the README table but unreachable via `npx terminaltui demo`).

## Cleanup (non-functional, ~100 files)

29 macOS sync-conflict duplicates, 6 top-level prompt scratch files, `TEST_RESULTS.md`, `test-create-prompt.ts`, `run-demo.ts`, `.gitignore 2`, the `demo/` legacy folder, the `showcase/` folder (duplicate of demos/), `test-sites/` (~23 unreferenced sub-projects), 19 top-level `test-*` dirs, `fonts_tmp/`, `results/`, `assets/recordings/test-debug.*`, `assets/recordings/test-v2.*`, the empty top-level `themes/` folder.

`.gitignore` updated to prevent re-accumulation.

## Documentation

- README rewritten for file-based-only. Documentation table expanded from 2 of 11 docs files to all 12. Test count badge corrected from inflated `2,185+` to honest `1,500+`.
- `docs/getting-started.md`, `docs/routing.md`, `docs/cli-reference.md`, `docs/api-routes.md` rewritten — only file-based covered.
- `docs/serve.md` created (SSH hosting was undocumented since 1.5.0).
- `claude/SKILL.md` overhauled — added `Hosting & Deployment` section (`SSHServer`/`TerminalIO`/`ProcessTerminalIO`/`runFileBasedSite`/`FileRouter`); added layout-fn references (`container`/`row`/`col`/`menu`); removed all `defineSite`/`page`/`route`/`migrate`/`split`/`artCompose`/braille references; replaced two 100-line example walkthroughs with one tight file-based example.
- `CONTRIBUTING.md` rewritten — correct git URL, `npm run build`/`typecheck`, accurate test layout, dependency truth.
- `ARCHITECTURE.md` rewritten — current 10 themes, `forms/` corrected (lives in `core/runtime-forms.ts`), `router/` and `helpers/` documented, `core/ssh-server.ts` and `core/terminal-io.ts` documented; deleted-file references stripped.
- `CHANGELOG.md` v1.0.0–v1.0.4 dates corrected (impossible 2025-05-* dates fixed to actual 2026-03-* dates from `git log`).

## Migration from 1.5.x

If you were using `defineSite`/`page`/`route`/`split`/`box`:

1. **Convert to file-based**: one file per page under `pages/`, one `config.ts` with `defineConfig()`. Each page file default-exports a function returning content blocks; optionally exports a `metadata` const.

2. **Replace `split()`** — horizontal:
   \`\`\`ts
   // before
   split({ direction: \"horizontal\", ratio: 30, first, second })
   // after
   columns([
     panel({ width: \"30%\", content: first }),
     panel({ width: \"70%\", content: second }),
   ])
   \`\`\`
   Vertical splits become \`rows(...)\` with \`height\` instead of \`width\`.

3. **Replace `box()`** with `panel({ content, border, padding })` (no title/scroll) or `container({ content, padding })` (centered).

4. **Replace `transitions: \"fade\"`** in `animations` — just remove it. Boot animation and exit message still work.

5. **`terminaltui build`** still works — but only on file-based projects. Run it against `config.ts`, not `site.config.ts`.

## Why this release exists

Per discussion in https://github.com/OmarMusayev/terminaltui — with no production users yet, dual-API maintenance was carrying cost without benefit. This release commits to one project shape so the codebase, docs, and AI-skill file are all internally consistent.
releases.name: v1.6.0 — File-Based Only (Big Cleanup)

releases.body:
Fixes 7 issues from SSH serve feedback.

### Fixed
- **SSH color mode from client TERM** — detects truecolor/256/16 from the SSH client's TERM type instead of hardcoding 256
- **openUrl() guarded in serve mode** — shows URL as notification instead of exec'ing shell commands on the server
- **Per-runtime colorMode** — multi-user SSH sessions no longer clobber each other's color mode
- **Reset before erase-line** — prevents background color bleeding across lines
- **Focused primary button style** — bold accent text instead of solid background fill
- **Easter egg functions disabled in serve mode** — prevents unintended server-side execution

### Added
- **`serve` config in SiteConfig** — `port`, `hostKeyPath`, `maxConnections`, `colorMode`, `openUrls`, `auth`
- **`termType` on TerminalIO** — exposes SSH client's TERM string
- **`isServeMode` on TUIRuntime** — runtime-level serve mode detection
releases.name: v1.5.1 — SSH Serve Hardening

releases.body:
## SSH Hosting (`terminaltui serve`)

Host any TUI app over SSH — users connect with `ssh host -p PORT`, zero install required. Each connection gets an independent session with full interactivity.

```bash
terminaltui serve --port 2222
# From any machine:
ssh localhost -p 2222
```

### Added
- **`terminaltui serve` CLI command** — `--port`, `--host-key`, `--max-connections` flags
- **`TerminalIO` interface** — abstracts terminal I/O away from `process.stdin`/`process.stdout`
- **`SSHServer` export** — programmatic API for embedding SSH hosting
- **Per-connection sessions** — each SSH client gets independent state, navigation, and forms

### Changed
- `TUIRuntime` accepts optional `TerminalIO` (defaults to `ProcessTerminalIO` for backward compat)
- `InputManager` and `Screen` refactored to use injectable `TerminalIO`
- SSH sessions default to 256-color mode (safe for all terminals)
- Process signals scoped to local sessions only (SSH disconnects don't kill the server)
- `ssh2` added as optional dependency (only needed for `serve`)

### Install
```bash
npm install terminaltui@1.5.0
# For SSH hosting:
npm install ssh2
```
releases.name: v1.5.0 — SSH Hosting

releases.body:
### Fixed
- Single-file build produces functional bundles — `terminaltui build` now wraps the entry with `runSite()`
- File-based routing build uses relative paths instead of hardcoded absolute paths
- `compileFile()` throws clear errors when esbuild is unavailable
- `_entry.ts` cleaned up after build

### Added
- `text()` content helper export
- Build validation (checks for `runSite()` call and absolute paths)

### Note
Versions 1.1.0–1.3.0 were experimental publishes from a separate codebase and have been deprecated on npm. This release continues from the stable 1.0.x line.
releases.name: v1.4.0 — Build System Fixes

releases.body: Fix 21 file-based routing bugs (hidden pages in menu, dynamic route nav, duplicate menu, build missing pages), add chat() component, defineEnv(), terminaltui validate command, dev mode auto-validation, updated prompts with list→detail patterns
releases.name: v1.0.9 — Fix routing bugs, chat component, validate command

releases.body: Add layout strategy guide to convert prompt — single-column vs grid with pros/cons for each approach.
releases.name: v1.0.8 — Layout Strategy Guide

releases.body: Rewrite convert prompt to use file-based routing and `npx terminaltui dev` workflow.
releases.name: v1.0.7 — File-Based Routing in Convert

releases.body: Updated convert prompt with grid system components for AI-assisted website conversion.
releases.name: v1.0.6 — Grid System Components

releases.body:
# Changelog

## [1.0.5] - 2026-03-26

### Added

- **Spatial Navigation Engine** — arrow keys now move to the nearest focusable item by screen position (like a TV remote / Android TV D-pad), replacing the old panel-based Tab cycling
  - `findNextFocus()` algorithm scores candidates by distance + alignment (2x weight on axis alignment)
  - Direction-filtered: only items in the arrow direction are candidates
  - ← from leftmost position goes back; automatic for all layout functions
  - New `computeFocusPositions()` in flex-engine walks the entire content tree and assigns FocusRect screen coordinates to every focusable item

- **12-Column Responsive Grid System** — Bootstrap-style layout primitives
  - `container(content, { maxWidth, padding, center })` — centered content wrapper
  - `row(cols, { gap })` — 12-column grid row with responsive column wrapping
  - `col(content, { span, offset, xs, sm, md, lg })` — grid column with breakpoint-aware spans
  - Responsive breakpoints: xs (<60 cols), sm (60-89), md (90-119), lg (≥120)
  - Rows auto-wrap when effective spans exceed 12 at the current breakpoint
  - Nesting support — rows inside cols inside rows

- **Unified Box Model** — single source of truth for component width calculation
  - `computeBoxDimensions(allocatedWidth, { border, padding, margin })` — every component calls this
  - `COMPONENT_DEFAULTS` — centralized padding/border/margin defaults for all 28+ components
  - Zero manual `width - N` math remaining in any component file

- **File-Based Routing** — Next.js App Router-style directory-based page routing
  - `config.ts` + `pages/` directory structure replaces single `site.config.ts` for larger projects
  - Page files: `export default function About() { return [...] }` with optional `export const metadata`
  - Layout files: `pages/layout.ts` wraps siblings/descendants, receives `{ children }`
  - Nested layouts compose from outside in (root → section → page)
  - Dynamic routes: `pages/projects/[slug].ts` receives `{ params: { slug } }`
  - Async pages: `export default async function Dashboard() { ... }`
  - File-based API routes: `api/stats.ts` exports `GET()`, `POST()`, etc.
  - Auto-generated menu from filesystem (ordering via `metadata.order`, labels via `metadata.label`)
  - Manual menu override in `defineConfig({ menu: { items: [...] } })`
  - New `menu({ source: "auto" })` component for inline auto-menu rendering
  - `MenuBlock` content type added to the block union
  - `FileRouter` class: scanner → route table → menu builder → page loader → layout chain
  - 9 router module files: types, scanner, route-table, menu-builder, page-loader, layout-chain, api-loader, resolver, index

- **`terminaltui migrate`** CLI command — converts existing `site.config.ts` to file-based routing structure (config.ts + pages/ + api/)

- **`defineConfig()` overload** — now accepts file-based routing config (`{ name, theme, menu, ... }`) in addition to the existing env-var schema

- **9 demos migrated to file-based routing** — each demo now has both `site.config.ts` (backward compat) and `config.ts` + `pages/` (new structure)

- **169 new router unit tests** across 8 test files (scanner, route-table, menu-builder, page-loader, layout-chain, api-loader, resolver, migrate) plus 1 integration test

- **204 demo navigation tests** — emulator-based tests for all 9 demos

- **103 box model tests** and **41 grid system tests**

### Changed

- **All 9 demos rebuilt with spatial layouts** — split, grid, row/col, container patterns throughout
  - developer-portfolio: row/col grid for skills, container for centered content
  - restaurant: tabs for menu, split for contact form, row/col for menu items
  - startup: row/col for features and pricing, accordion for quickstart
  - band: row/col for discography and press quotes, container for about
  - coffee-shop: tabs for menu, row/col for beans and hours
  - conference: tabs for schedule, row/col for speakers and sponsors
  - freelancer: row/col for services, work portfolio, and testimonials
  - dashboard: row/col for stat cards, split for posts
  - server-dashboard: row/col for resource cards, split for system info

- **Navigation model** — spatial navigation replaces Tab-based panel cycling on all layout pages; Tab still works as sequential fallback
  - ↑↓/jk move to nearest item above/below by screen position
  - ←→/hl move to nearest item left/right; ← from leftmost goes back

- **CLI `dev` command** auto-detects project type: file-based (`config.ts` + `pages/`) vs single-file (`site.config.ts`)

- **CLI `findConfig()`** now checks for `config.ts` + `pages/` before falling back to `site.config.ts`

### Fixed

- Card height equalization causing excessive whitespace in side-by-side layouts
- Border clipping at very narrow terminal widths (<10 cols)
- Search input dropdown filling entire viewport
- Focus prefix overflow causing content to exceed terminal width
- Percentage column overflow in layoutColumns
- Button ignoring ctx.width (labels now truncate to fit)
- Section/accordion/timeline content overflow beyond allocated width
- Responsive row wrapping not honoring breakpoints
- Emulator resize not triggering app re-render (SIGWINCH forwarding)
- Table cells missing right-padding in truncation

### Removed

- `PanelFocusManager` — no longer imported or used (file still exists as dead code); superseded by spatial navigation

### Breaking Changes

- **Navigation behavior change**: Arrow keys on layout pages now use spatial navigation instead of panel-based Tab cycling. The `panelArrows` config option still exists but has no effect. Users who relied on Tab to switch panels can still use Tab (sequential fallback), but arrow keys now move spatially.

## [1.0.4] - 2025-05-24

### Changed
- Modularized codebase: split runtime into runtime-input, runtime-pages, runtime-render, runtime-block-render, runtime-forms
- Lazy-load fonts (reduced startup time)
- Updated docs: component registry, fixed npm import paths, added ARCHITECTURE.md references

## [1.0.3] - 2025-05-23

### Added
- `terminaltui demo` command — run 8 built-in demos from npm
- Server dashboard demo with nested layouts

### Changed
- Rebuilt all 8 demos with split-pane layouts (columns, rows, split, grid)

## [1.0.2] - 2025-05-22

### Added
- Split-pane layouts: `columns()`, `rows()`, `split()`, `grid()`, `panel()`
- Panel focus management (Tab/Shift+Tab between panels)
- Active panel border indicator
- Responsive collapse for narrow terminals

## [1.0.1] - 2025-05-21

### Fixed
- 8 bugs found during full framework verification (P0-P3)
- Menu navigation now enforces middleware
- Lifecycle hooks fire on menu navigation
- Route function titles resolve correctly
- `computed()` auto-invalidates
- `section()` gives clear error on wrong args
- Viewport scrolls past last focusable item
- Emulator `goHome()` and `navigateTo()` fixes

## [1.0.0] - 2025-05-20

### Added
- Initial release: 21+ content blocks, 10 themes, ASCII art system, state management, data fetching, routing, middleware, API routes, forms, CLI, emulator, Claude integration
releases.name: v1.0.5 — Spatial Navigation, Grid System, Unified Box Model & File-Based Routing

releases.body:
## What's New

Full internal codebase refactor — modular, documented, contributor-ready. **Public API unchanged.**

### Architecture
- **runtime.ts split** from 2,454 lines into 8 focused modules
- **14 fonts** split into individual lazy-loaded files under `ascii/fonts/`
- **12 oversized files** split (shapes, compose, dataviz, scenes, image, cli/art)
- **Component registry** — `ComponentRegistry` maps block types to renderers

### Documentation
- **ARCHITECTURE.md** — module map, data flow, dependency graph, how-to guides
- **JSDoc** on all public API functions

### Other
- 1 dependency (esbuild)
- All 1,572 tests passing
- Zero typecheck errors
- Zero circular dependencies
releases.name: v1.0.4 — Architecture Refactor

releases.body:
### Added

**`terminaltui demo`** — run built-in demos instantly from npm:

```bash
npx terminaltui demo restaurant
npx terminaltui demo dashboard
npx terminaltui demo band
npx terminaltui demo coffee-shop
npx terminaltui demo conference
npx terminaltui demo developer-portfolio
npx terminaltui demo freelancer
npx terminaltui demo startup
```

No setup, no config files, no dependencies. Just run and explore.
releases.name: v1.0.3 — Built-in Demos

releases.body:
## Bug Fixes

- Menu navigation now enforces middleware
- Lifecycle hooks fire on menu navigation
- Route function titles resolve correctly
- `computed()` auto-invalidates on dependency change
- `section()` gives clear error on wrong args
- Viewport scrolls past last focusable item

## Emulator Fixes

- `goHome()` works at all terminal widths
- `navigateTo()` works when called from a page view

790 tests across 14 parallel agents.
releases.name: v1.0.2 — Bug Fixes

releases.body:
## What's New

### API Routes

Define backend endpoints directly in `site.config.ts` — no Express, no separate server.

- Local HTTP server starts automatically (Node built-in `http`, zero deps)
- Relative URLs in `fetcher()`, `request.*()`, `liveData()` auto-resolve
- GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH with URL params, query strings, JSON body

### `terminaltui create`

Interactive prompt builder for new projects.

### Documentation

- New: API Routes guide, Create Command guide
- New: Dashboard example with API routes
releases.name: v1.0.1 — API Routes & Create Command

releases.body:
# terminaltui v1.0.0

**Turn any website into a beautiful terminal experience.**

## Highlights

- **21+ components** — Card, Timeline, Table, Hero, Gallery, Tabs, Accordion, Quote, Badge, ProgressBar, and more
- **10 input components** — TextInput, TextArea, Select, Checkbox, Toggle, RadioGroup, NumberInput, SearchInput, Button, Form
- **10 built-in themes** — cyberpunk, dracula, nord, monokai, solarized, gruvbox, catppuccin, tokyoNight, rosePine, hacker
- **14 ASCII art fonts** — with gradient and shadow support
- **15 scenes, 32 icons, 12 patterns** — built-in art assets
- **Reactive state** — createState, computed, dynamic blocks, createPersistentState
- **Data fetching** — fetcher (cache/retry/refresh), request (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/PATCH), liveData (WebSocket/SSE)
- **Parameterized routes** — route() with params, navigate(), card action navigation
- **Middleware** — global and per-page, redirect, requireEnv
- **AI conversion** — `terminaltui convert` drops docs for Claude Code to auto-convert any website
- **TUI emulator** — headless testing framework (like Puppeteer for terminals)
- **Zero npm dependencies** — pure Node.js 18+
- **1,500+ tests** passing

## Install

```bash
npm install terminaltui
```

## Quick Start

```bash
terminaltui init
terminaltui dev
```

## Demos

```bash
npx demo-tui-restaurant
npx demo-tui-cafe
npx demo-tui-tetris
```
releases.name: v1.0.0 — Initial Release
